==Irish Gambit / Chicago Gambit==
=== 3. Nxe5?? ===
The Irish Gambit is an unsound opening. It trades a knight for a pawn, since Black can just recapture with [[/3...Nxe5|3...Nxe5]]. While this move does let White have a stronger center, the cost of a knight is too much to pay.  Still, like other dubious openings, it can be used to surprise or unsettle the opponent.
